description_long: This nightstand features a minimalist, modern design with a slender metal frame supporting a rectangular tabletop. The tabletop is accompanied by a small, round mirror mounted on a thin vertical rod at one end, and a compact, circular tray or container on the surface. The legs are thin and straight, providing an open and airy appearance, while the overall structure is lightweight and functional. The materials appear to be primarily metal, with a glass or polished surface for the tabletop and mirror. The color palette is monochromatic, dominated by black and gray tones, giving it a sleek, contemporary look. This piece is well-suited for urban environments, such as lofts or modern apartments, and could serve as a compact vanity or accent table.
description: A sleek, modern nightstand with a thin metal frame, a round mirror, and a small circular tray on a rectangular tabletop in black and gray tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular tabletop, round mirror on the left, and small circular tray on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile, with the mirror and tray visible on the tabletop.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the mirror and the open frame structure beneath the tabletop.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim legs and the arrangement of the mirror and tray from the other side.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: against a wall or beside a bed
